text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'm not feeling so hot...
choice_data_list: Hmm, you're kind of pale too.
Hmm, you're kind of pale too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I'm trying out this new brand of
protein.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But it's not sitting too well with me, and my
stomach...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I think I'll pass on lunch today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The digestive system proves to be a difficult
muscle to train, causing Mejiro Ryan to remain in
poor condition the whole day.
